text: chazon yeshu'a hamashicha asher natan-lo haelohim lehareot et-'avadayv et asher-yiheye bimehera vehu hodi'a beshalecho beyad-maleakho le'avedo leyochanan
asher he'id devar haelohim ve'edut yeshu'a hamashicha veet-kol asher raa
asherey haqore veasherey hashome'im et-diverey hanevua veshomerim et-hakatuv bah ki qerova ha'et
yochanan lesheva' haqehilot asher beaseya chesed lakhem veshalom meet haho vehaya veyavo umeet shive'at haruchot asher lifeney khiseo
umeet-yeshu'a hamashicha ha'ed haneeman uvekhor hametim ve'eleyon lemalekhey-arets asher ahav otanu uvedamo gealanu mechatoteynu
vaya'as otanu melakhim vekhohanim lelohim aviv lo hakavod veha'oz le'olemey 'olamim amen
hine hu va 'im-ha'ananim veraata oto kal-'ayin gam-hema asher deqaruhu vesafedu 'alayv kal-mishepechot haarets ken yiheye amen
ani haalef vehatav rosh vasof neum yeho elohim haho vehaya veyavo elohey tsevaot
ani yochanan achikhem vegam-chaver lakhem belachats uvemalekhut uvesavelanut lema'an yeshu'a hamashicha hayiti vai asher-shemo patemos ba'avur devar haelohim uva'avur 'edut yeshu'a hamashicha
vatehi 'alay rucha beyom haadon vaeshema' acharay qol gadol keqol shofar

vayomer ani haalef vaani hatav harishon vehaacharon veet asher ata roe ketov 'al-sefer ushelachehu el-haqehilot asher beaseya leefesos velizemirena ulefaregemos uletiatira ulesaredis ulefiladelefiya uleludeqeya
vaefen lireot et-haqol hamedaber elay vayehi bifenoti vaere sheva' menorot zahav
uvetokh sheva' hamenorot demut ben-adam lavush me'il vechagur ezor zahav 'al-libo
verosho use'aro levanim ketsemer tsachar kashaleg ve'eynayv kelabat esh
umaregelotayv ke'eyn nechshet qalal tserufot bakur veqolo keqol mayim rabim
uveyad-yemino shive'a khokhavim umipiv yotset cherev pifiot chada ufanayv kashemesh hameir bigevurato
vaere oto vaepol leragelayv kemet vayashet 'alay yad-yemino vayomer al-tira ani harishon vehaacharon vehechay
vaehi met vehineni chay le'olemey 'olamim amen uveyadi mafetechot sheol vamavet
ve'ata khetov et asher-raita vaasher-na'ase 'ata vaasher-'atid liheyot acharey-khen
et-sod shive'at hakokhavim asher raita vimini veet-sheva' menorot hazahav shive'at hakokhavim hem maleakhey sheva' haqehilot vesheva' hamenorot asher raita sheva' qehilot hena
el-maleakh qehal efesos ketov ko amar haochez bimino shive'at hakokhavim hamitehalekh betokh sheva' menorot hazahav
yada'eti et-ma'aseykha veet-'amalekha veet-savelekha vaasher lo-tukhal seet et-haresha'im vativechan et-haomerim shelichim anachenu veeynam vatimetsaem doverey shaqer
veata nasata harebe veyesh-lekha savelanut ulema'an shemi lo ya'afeta
akh yesh-li 'aleykha ki natasheta et-ahavatekha harishona
zakhera efo ey-mize nafaleta veshuva va'ase khema'aseykha harishonim veim-lo hineni va 'aleykha maher vehadafeti menoratekha mimeqomah im-lo tashuv
aval zot lakh asher sne ata et-ma'asey haniqelasim asher senetim gam-ani
mi asher-ozen lo yishema' et asher harucha omer laqehilot hamenatsecha eten-lo leekhol me'ets hachayim asher betokh gan-elohim
veel-maleakh qehal zemirena ketov ko amar harishon vehaacharon asher-met vayechi
yada'eti et-ma'aseykha veet-tsaratekha veet-reyshekha veulam 'ashir ata veet-gidufey haomerim yehudim anachenu veeynam ki im-keneset hasatan
al-tira mipeney-asher 'aleykha lisebol hine 'atid hamaleshin latet mikem bamishemar lema'an tenusu viheyitem batsara 'aseret yamim heye neeman 'ad-hamavet venatati lekha 'ateret hachayim
mi asher-ozen lo yishema' et asher harucha omer laqehilot hamenatsecha lo yinazeq bamavet hasheni
veel-maleakh qehal paregemos ketov ko amar asher-lo cherev pifiot hachada
yada'eti et-ma'aseykha veet-meqom shivetekha asher-sham kise hasatan vatidebaq bishemi velo shiqareta beemunati gam-bimey anetifas 'edi haneeman asher neherag etselekhem bimeqom moshav hasatan
akhe-me'at yesh-li 'aleykha ki-sham 'imekha anashim deveqim beleqach bile'am asher hora et-balaq latet mikheshol lifeney beney yiserael leekhol mizivechey elilim velizenot
ken nimetseu gam-bekha anashim deveqim beleqach haniqelasim asher saneti
shuva veim-lo tashuv avo 'aleykha mehera venilechameti vam becherev pi

mi asher-ozen lo yishema' et asher harucha omer laqehilot hamenatsecha aakhilenu min-haman haganuz venatati lo even levana ve'al-haeven mefutach shem chadash asher lo yeda'enu ish zulati asher nitan lo
veel-maleakh qehal tiatira ketov ko amar ben-haelohim asher 'eynayv kelabat-esh umaregelotayv ke'eyn-nechshet qalal
yada'eti et-ma'aseykha veahavatekha veemunatekha va'avodatekha vesavelekha vaasher ma'aseykha haacharonim rabim min-harishonim
akhe-me'at yesh-li 'aleykha ki tanicha laisha leizevel haomeret nevia anokhi lelamed ulehate'ot et-'avaday lizenot veleekhol zivechey elilim
vaeten-lah zeman lashuv vehi meana lashuv mitazenuteyha
hineni mapil otah lemishekav veet-hamenaafim 'imah betsara gedola im-lo yashuvu mima'aseyhem
veharageti vamavet baneyha veyade'u khal-haqehilot ki ani choqer kelayot valev venatati lakhem leish kiferi ma'alalayv
veatem shear hanimetseim betiatira kol asher-eyn lahem haleqach hahu velo yade'u et-'amuqot hasatan kaasher hem mitehalalim lakhem ani omer lo-asim 'aleykhem masa acher
efes mah-sheyesh lakhem bo hachaziqu 'ad-boi
vehamenatsecha veshomer et-ma'asay 'ad-'et qets eten-lo shaletan 'al-hagoyim
vera'am beshevet barezel kikheli yotser yenupatsu kaasher qibaleti gam-anokhi meet avi
venatati lo kokhav hashachar
mi asher-ozen lo yishema' et-asher harucha omer laqehilot
veel-maleakh qehal saredis ketov ko amar asher-lo sheva' ruchot haelohim veshive'at hakokhavim yada'eti et-ma'aseykha ki-lekha shem keilu chay ata vehinekha met
sheqod vechazeq et-hasheerit haqerova lamut ki lo-matsati ma'aseykha shelemim lifeney elohay
zekhor et asher-qibaleta veshama'eta veshamerah-zot veshuva veim-lo tisheqod hineni va 'aleykha kaganav velo teda' hasha'a asher avo 'aleykha
yesh-lekha gam-besaredis shemot me'at asher lo gealu et-malebusheyhem veyitehalekhu iti levushey levanim ki reuyim hem lazot
hamenatsecha yilebash begadim levanim velo emeche et-shemo misefer hachayim veode shemo lifeney avi velifeney maleakhayv
mi asher-ozen lo yishema' et asher harucha omer laqehilot
veel-maleakh qehal filadelefiya ketov ko amar haqadosh haamiti asher beyado mafetecha david hapotecha veeyn soger vesoger veeyn potecha
yada'eti et-ma'aseykha hine natati lefaneykha sha'ar patucha asher lo-yukhal ish lesagero ki khocha-me'at lakh vatishemor et-devari velo khichasheta bishemi
hineni noten anashim mikeneset hasatan asher yomeru yehudim anachenu veeynam ki-doverey sheqer hema hineni 'ose asher yavou lehishetachaot lerageleykha veyade'u ki ani ahavetikha
ya'an shamareta devar savelanuti eshemarekha gam-ani mishe'at hanisayon ha'atida lavo 'al-tevel kulah lenasot et-yoshevey haarets
hineni va mehera hachazeq baasher lakh lema'an lo-yiqach ish et-nizerekha

hamenatsecha etenenu le'amud beheykhal elohay velo-yetse 'od hachutsa vekhataveti 'alayv et-shem elohay veet-shem 'ir elohay yerushalayim hachadasha hayoredet mishamayim me'im-elohay veet-shemi hechadash
mi asher-ozen lo yishema' et asher harucha omer laqehilot
veel-maleakh qehal ludeqeya ketov ko amar haamen ha'ed haneeman vehaamiti reshit beriat haelohim
yada'eti et-ma'aseykha ki lo qar ata velo cham mi-yiten vehayita qar o-cham
ki 'ata posher ata velo qar velo cham 'al-ken aqiakha mipi
ki amareta akh 'ashareti matsati on li velo chasareti kol velo yada'eta ki-umelal ata vedavay ve'ani ve'iver ve'erom
i'atsekha liqenot meiti zahav tsaruf baesh lema'an ta'ashir uvegadim levanim lema'an titekase vahem velo terae boshet 'erevatekha veqilurit latet 'al-'eyneykha lema'an tiree
ani et-kol asher ehav okhicha vaayaser lakhen tisheqod vetashuv
hineni 'omed bapetach vedofeq vehaya ki-yishema' ish leqoli ufatach hapetach avo elayv vesa'adeti 'imo vehu 'imi
hamenatsecha etenenu lashevet iti 'al-kisei kaasher nitsacheti gam-anokhi vaeshev et-avi 'al-kiseo
mi asher-ozen lo yishema' et asher harucha omer laqehilot
achar hadevarim haele raiti vehine sha'ar nifetach bashamayim vehaqol harishon asher shema'etiv keqol shofar midaber elay omer 'ale hena veareeaa et asher-hayo yiheye acharey-khen
ukherega' hayiti sham barucha vehine khise nirea vashamayim ve'al-hakise yoshev
vehayoshev mareehu kemaree even yashefe vaodem veqeshet saviv lakise umareeyha ke'eyn baraqet
vesaviv lakise areba'a ve'eserim kiseot ve'al-hakiseot raiti et areba'a ve'eserim hazeqenim yoshevim melubashim begadim levanim ve'aterot zahav berasheyhem
umin-hakise yotseim beraqim ure'amim veqolot veshive'a lapidey esh bo'arim lifeney hakise vehem shive'a ruchot haelohim
velifeney hakise yam zekhokhit ke'eyn haqarach uvetokh hakise vesaviv lakise areba' chayot meleot 'eynayim milifeneyhem umeachoreyhem
udemut hachaya harishona keareye vehachaya hashenit keshor ufeney hachaya hashelishit kifeney adam udemut hachaya harevi'it kenesher me'ofef
veareba' hachayot shesh kenafayim shesh kenafayim leechat vehen meleot 'eynayim misaviv umilifenim veeyn-domi lahen yomam valayela veomerot qadosh qadosh qadosh yeho elohim tsevaot haya veho veyavo
umidey-tet hachayot kavod vehadar vetoda layoshev 'al-hakise hachay le'olemey 'olamim
venafelu 'eserim veareba'a hazeqenim 'al-peneyhem lifeney hayoshev 'al-hakise vehishetachavu lechey 'olemey 'olamim vesamu et-'ateroteyhem lifeney hakise lemor
lekha nae adoneynu veloheynu laset kavod vehadar va'oz ki ata barata hakol vehakol biretsonekha hayu veniverau
vaere bimin hayoshev 'al-hakise sefer katuv panim veachor vechatum beshive'a chotamot
vaere maleakh abir qore veqol-gadol mi yizeke lifetocha hasefer ulehatir et-chotamayv
velo-yakhol ish lo vashamayim lo vaarets velo mitachat laarets lifetocha et-hasefer velo lehabit bo
vaeveae bekhi gadol 'al-asher eyn ish zokhe lifetocha et-hasefer veliqero vo velo lehabit bo
vayomer elay echad min-hazeqenim al-tiveke hine natsach haareye asher hu mishevet yehuda shoresh david lifetocha et-hasefer ulehatir shive'at chotamayv
vaere vehine beyn hakise veareba' hachayot uveyn hazeqenim 'omed se vehu khetavucha velo sheva' qeranayim veshive'a 'eynayim asher hem shive'a ruchot haelohim hasheluchim el-kal-haarets
vayavo vayiqach et-hasefer mimin hayoshev 'al-hakise
vayehi beqacheto et-hasefer vayipelu lifeney hase areba' hachayot ve'eserim veareba'a hazeqenim veish kinoro beyado veqa'arot zahav meleot qetoret asher-hena tefilot haqedoshim
vayashiru shir chadash lemor lekha nae laqachat et-hasefer velifetocha et-chotamayv ki ata nishechateta uvedamekha qanita lelohim mikal-mishepacha velashon vekhal-'am vagoy
vata'as otam melakhim vekhohanim leloheynu veyimelekhu 'al-haarets
vaere vaeshema' qol maleakhim rabim saviv lakise velachayot velazeqenim vehem ribo revavot vealefey alafim
qoreim beqol gadol nae lase hatavucha laqachat 'oz ve'osher vechakhema ugevura vehadar vekhavod uverakha

vekhal-beriya asher bashamayim uvaarets umitachat laarets vaasher 'al-hayam vekhol asher bahem et-kulam shama'eti omerim lemor layoshev 'al-hakise velase haberakha vehehadar vehakavod veha'oz le'olemey 'olamim
vatomarena areba' hachayot amen ve'eserim veareba'a hazeqenim nafelu 'al-peneyhem vayishetachavu lechey 'olemey ha'olamim
vaere hase potecha echad min-shive'a hachotamot vaeshema' achat meareba' hachayot medaberet veqolo keqol ra'am lemor bo uree
vaabit vehine sus lavan veharokhev 'alayv qeshet beyado vatinaten-lo 'atara vayetse menatsecha ulema'an yenatsecha
ukhefitecho et-hachotam hasheni vaeshema' et-hachaya hashenit omeret bo uree
vayetse sus sheni vehu adom ulerokhevo nitan leha'avir et-hashalom min-haarets lema'an yaharegu ish et-achiv vatinaten-lo cherev gedola
ukhefitecho et-hachotam hashelishi vaeshema' et-hachaya hashelishit omeret bo uree vaabit vehine sus shachor uveyad rokhevo mozenayim
vaeshema' qol mitokh areba' hachayot omer qav chitim bedinar ushelosha qabim se'orim bedinar veet-hashemen vehayayin al-tashechet
ukhefitecho et-hachotam harevi'i vaeshema' et-hachaya harevi'it omeret bo uree
vaere vehine sus yeraqeraq veharokhev 'alayv shemo mavet usheol yotset leragelayv vayinaten lahem shaletan 'al-revi'it haarets lehamit bacherev uvara'av uvadever uvechayat haarets
ukhefitecho hachotam hachamishi vaere mitachat lamizebecha et-nafeshot hatevuchim 'al-devar haelohim ve'al-ha'edut asher hayeta befihem
vayize'aqu beqol gadol vayomeru adonay haqadosh vehaamiti 'ad-matay lo tishepot velo-tiqom et-dameynu miyoshevey haarets
vayutan lekhal-echad mehem simela levana vayeamar aleyhem lanucha 'od zeman me'at 'ad-melot misepar chavereyhem vaacheyhem shesofam lehareg kemohem
vaere befitecho et-hachotam hashishi vehine ra'ash gadol vayiqedar hashemesh kesaq se'ar vehayarecha nehepakh ledam
vekhokhevey hashamayim nafelu aretsa kaasher tino'a teena berucha chazaqa vehishelikha pageyha
vehashamayim mashu kesefer nigelal vekhal-har vai mimeqomam ne'etaqu
umalekhey haarets vehanegidim vesarey haalafim veha'ashirim vehataqifim vekhal-'eved vekhal-ben-chorim hitechabeu bame'arot uvesale'ey heharim
vayomeru el-heharim veel-hasela'im nifelu 'aleynu vekhasunu mipeney hayoshev 'al-hakise umipeney chamat hase
ki va yom apo hagadol umi ya'amod
veacharey-khen raiti areba'a maleakhim 'omedim beareba' kanefot haarets vaya'atseru beareba' ruchot haarets asher lo-tishov rucha lo vaarets velo vayam velo vekhal-'ets
vaere maleakh acher 'ole mimizerach-shemesh uveyado chotemet elohim chayim vayiqera qol gadol el-areba'a hamaleakhim asher-nitan lahem lechabel haarets vehayam lemor
al-techabelu et-haarets veet-hayam veet-ha'ets 'ad im-chatamenu et-'avedey eloheynu 'al-mitsechotam
vaeshema' misepar hachatumim mea elef veareba'im veareba'a alef vehem chatumim mikal-shivetey beney yiserael
leshevet yehuda chatumim sheneym 'asar alef leshevet reuven chatumim sheneym 'asar alef leshevet gad chatumim sheneym 'asar alef
leshevet asher chatumim sheneym 'asar alef leshevet nafetali chatumim sheneym 'asar alef leshevet menashe chatumim sheneym 'asar alef
leshevet shime'on chatumim sheneym 'asar alef leshevet levi chatumim sheneym 'asar alef leshevet yisashkhar chatumim sheneym 'asar alef
leshevet zevulun chatumim sheneym 'asar alef leshevet yosef chatumim sheneym 'asar alef leshevet bineyamin chatumim sheneym 'asar alef

acharey-khen raiti vehine hamon rav asher lo-yakhol ish limenoto mikal-hagoyim vehamishepachot veha'amim vehaleshonot vaya'amedu lifeney hakise velifeney hase vehem melubashim semalot levanot vekhapot temarim bideyhem
vayiqereu veqol-gadol lemor hayeshu'a leloheynu hayoshev 'al-hakise velase
vekhal-hamaleakhim 'amedu saviv lakise vesaviv lazeqenim uleareba' hachayot vayipelu 'al-peneyhem lifeney hakise vayishetachavu lelohim
vayomeru amen haberakha vehakavod vehachakhema vehatoda vehehadar vehakocha veha'oz leloheynu le'olemey 'olamim amen
vaya'an echad min-hazeqenim vayomer elay ele hamelubashim bigedey lavan mi hema umeayin bau
vaomar elayv adoni ata yada'eta vayomer elay ele hem habaim min-hatsara hagedola vayekhabesu et-simelotam vayalebinum bedam hase
lakhen hinam lifeney khise-haelohim umesharatim oto beheykhalo yomam valayela vehayoshev 'al-hakise yiten mishekano 'aleyhem
lo-yire'avu 'od velo yitsemau velo-yakem shemesh vesharav
ki hase asher betokh hakise hu yire'em ve'al-mabu'ey mayim chayim yenahalem umacha elohim kal-dime'a me'eyneyhem
ukhefitecho hachotam hashevi'i vatehi demama bashamayim kachatsi sha'a
vaere et-shive'at hamaleakhim ha'omedim lifeney haelohim vayinatenu lahem shive'a shofarot
vayavo maleakh acher vayigash el-hamizebecha umachetat zahav beyado vatinaten-lo qetoret harebe latet 'im-tefilot kal-haqedoshim 'al-mizebach hazahav asher lifeney hakise
vaya'al 'ashan haqetoret 'im-tefilot haqedoshim miyad hamaleakh lifeney elohim
vayiqach hamaleakh et-hamacheta vayemaleeha esh me'al-hamizebecha vayashelekh 'al-haarets vayehi qolot ure'amim uveraqim vara'ash
veshive'a hamaleakhim hahem asher beyadam shive'at hashofarot hite'atedu liteqo'a
vehamaleakh harishon taqa' bashofar vayehi-varad vaesh belulim bedam vatushelakh aretsa vatisaref shelishit ha'ets vekhal-yereq 'esev niseraf
vehamaleakh hasheni taqa' bashofar vehine kidemut har gadol bo'er baesh hushelakh el-tokh hayam vatehi shelishit hayam ledam
vatamat shelishit kal-nefesh chaya asher bayam ushelishit haoniot nishechata
vehamaleakh hashelishi taqa' bashofar vayipol min-hashamayim kokhav gadol bo'er kalapid vayipol 'al-shelishit haneharot ve'al-ma'eyenot hamayim
veshem hakokhav niqera la'ana vatehi shelishit hamayim lela'ana verabim mibeney adam metu min-hamayim ki marim hem
vehamaleakh harevi'i taqa' bashofar vatuke shelishit hashemesh ushelishit hayarecha ushelishit hakokhavim lema'an techeshakh shelishitam vehayom lo yair shelishito veaf lo halayela
vaere vaeshema' nesher echad me'ofef bachatsi hashamayim vehu qore qol gadol oy oy oy leyshevey haarets miyeter qolot hashofar asher sheloshet hamaleakhim 'atidim liteqo'a
vehamaleakh hachamishi taqa' bashofar vaere khokhav nofel min-hashamayim laarets velo nitan mafetecha beer hatehom
vayifetach et-beer hatehom vaya'al qitor min-habeer keqitor kiveshan gadol vayecheshakh hashemesh veharaqi'a miqitor habeer
umin-haqitor yatsa arebe 'al-haarets veshaletan nitan lahem keshaletan 'aqerabey haarets
vayeamar lahem asher lo yashechitu et-'esev haarets velo khal-yereq velo khal-'ets ki im-et-beney haadam asher eyn-lahem chotam haelohim bemitsechotam
velo nitan lahem lahamitam raq lehakheivam chamisha chodashim ukheevam kikheev ish asher yakehu ha'aqerav
uvayamim hahem yevaqeshu veney-adam et-hamavet velo yimetsauhu veyishealu et-nafesham lamut vehamavet yiverach mehem
vayehi maree haarebe kemaree susim 'arukhey milechama ve'al-rasheyhem ka'atarot ke'eyn zahav ufeneyhem kifeney adam
vese'ar lahem kise'ar nashim veshineyhem shiney areye
veshireyonim lahem keshireyoney varezel veqol kanefeyhem keqol marekevot susim rabim 'arukhim lamilechama
uzenavot lahem kezanevot 'aqerabim ve'oqatsim bezanevotam vehasheletu le'anot et-beney haadam chamisha chodashim
umaleakh hatehom hu melekh 'aleyhem ushemo avadon be'iverit veapoleyon bivanit
oy echad chalaf halakh lo veoy sheni ushelishi baim acharayv
vehamaleakh hashishi taqa' bashofar vaeshema' qol echad meareba' qarenot mizebach hazahav asher lifeney elohim
vayomer lamaleakh hashishi asher hashofar beyado hater et-areba'a hamaleakhim hahem haasurim 'al-hanahar hagadol nehar-perat
vayuteru areba'a hamaleakhim asher hayu nekhonim lasha'a velayom velachodesh velashana lehamit shelishit beney haadam
umisepar tsiveot haparashim 'eserim elef ribo vaani shama'eti miseparam
vekhen raiti vamarea et-hasusim verokheveyhem asher shireyonoteyhem ke'eyn esh utekhelet vegaferit verashey hasusim kerashey arayot umipihem yotse esh veqitor vegaferit
vatumat shelishit beney adam beshalsh magefot haele baesh uvaqitor uvagaferit hayotseot mipihem
ki-khocha hasusim befihem uvezanevotam ki zanevotam kanechashim verashim lahem uvahem yashechitu

ushear beney adam asher lo metu bamagefot haele bekhal-zot lo-shavu mima'asey yedeyhem mehishetachaot 'od lashedim vela'atsabey zahav vakhesef unechshet veeven va'ets asher lo-yireu velo-yisheme'u velo yehalekhu
velo shavu midarekam vayosifu liretsocha ulekhashef velizenot veligenov
vaere maleakh acher abir yored min hashamayim vehu 'ote 'anan ve'al-rosho kemaree haqeshet asher be'anan ufanayv kashemesh veragelayv ke'amudey esh
uveyado sefer qaton patucha vayasem et-regel yemino 'al-hayam veet-semolo 'al-haarets
vayiqera beqol gadol kaasher yisheag haareye uveqareo diberu shive'at hare'amim beqoloteyhem
ukhedaber shive'at hare'amim beqoloteyhem chafatseti likhetov vaeshema' qol min-hashamayim lemor chatom et asher-diberu shive'at hare'amim veal-tikhetov zot
vehamaleakh asher-reitiv 'omed 'al-hayam ve'al-haarets herim yemino el-hashamayim
vayishava' bechey 'olemey ha'olamim asher-bara et-hashamayim vekhal-asher bahem vehaarets vekhal-asher bah vehayam vekhal-asher-bo sheeyn 'od shahut
aval bimey qol hamaleakh hashevi'i be'amedo liteqo'a venishelam sod haelohim kaasher biser et-'avadayv haneviim
vehaqol asher shama'eti min-hashamayim diber elay shenit lemor lekh veqach et-hasefer haqaton hapatucha asher beyad-hamaleakh ha'omed 'al-hayam ve'al-haarets
vaavo el-hamaleakh vaomar elayv tenah-li et-hasefer vayomer elay qach veekhol oto vehu yemar bevitenekha uvefikha yiheye matoq kidevash
vaeqach et-hasefer miyad-hamaleakh vaokhelehu vayehi befi kidevash lematoq veacharey akheli oto vatimale viteni merorim
vayomeru elay 'od tashuv tinave 'al-'amim vegoyim uleshonot umelakhim rabim
vayinaten-li qane vehu khemate vaya'amod hamaleakh vayomer qum umod et-heykhal yeho veet hamizebecha veet hamishetachavim bo
vehechatser asher michuts laheykhal otah netosh veal-temudena ki-lagoyim nitana veramesu et-'ir haqodesh areba'im ushenayim chodashim
venatati lisheney 'eday venibeu yamim elef umatayim veshishim vehem mitekasim basaqim
ele hem sheney hazeytim ushetey hamenorot ha'omedim lifeney elohey haarets
vekhi-yevaqesh ish lehara' lahem esh yotset mipihem okhelet et-oyeveyhem vekhen kal-hamevaqesh lehara' lahem mot yumat
vehem yesh-leel yadam la'atsor et-hashamayim velo-yiheye matar bimey nevuatam veyisheletu 'al-hamayim lehafekham ledam ve'al-haarets lehakotah bekhal-nega' midey yechepatsu
uvekhalotam 'edutam hachaya ha'ola mitehom ta'ase 'imahem milechama vetukhal lahem vaharagatam
vehayeta nivelatam birechov ha'ir hagedola haniqeret kefi harucha beshem sedom umitserayim asher-sham nitselav gam-adoneyhem
verabim min-ha'amim vehamishepachot vehaleshonot vehagoyim yireu et-nivelatam yamim shelosha vachetsi velo yitenu lesum et-geviyotam baqevarim
veyoshevey haarets yisemechu 'aleyhem veya'alezu veyishelechu manot ish lere'ehu ki sheney haneviim haele hikheivu et-yoshevey haarets
vayehi acharey yamim shelosha vachetsi vatavo vahem rucha chayim meet haelohim vaya'amedu 'al-rageleyhem veeyma gedola nafela 'al-kal-roeyhem
vayisheme'u qol gadol min-hashamayema midaber aleyhem lemor 'alu hena vaya'alu ve'anan hashamayema ve'eyney sneeyhem root
uvasha'a hahi haya ra'ash gadol vatipol 'asirit ha'ir veshive'at alafim beney-adam lemisepar shemotam neheregu vara'ash vehanishearim re'ada achazatam vayitenu khavod lelohey hashamayim
oy sheni chalaf halakh lo veoy shelishi mehera yavo
vehamaleakh hashevi'i taqa' bashofar vayehi qolot gedolim bashamayim vayomeru hine mamelekhet ha'olam hayeta laadoneynu velimeshicho vehu yimelokh le'olemey 'olamim
ve'eserim veareba'a hazeqenim hayshevim lifeney haelohim 'al-kiseotam nafelu 'al-peneyhem vayishetachavu lelohim
vayomeru modim anachenu lekha yeho elohim tsevaot haho vehaya veyavo ki lavasheta 'uzekha hagadol vatimelokh
vehagoyim qatsafu vayavo qetsepekha ve'et lishepot hametim velatet sakhar la'avadeykha haneviim velaqedoshim uleyireey shemekha lemiqetanam ve'ad-gedolam ulehashechit et-mashechitey haarets
vayipatach heykhal yeho bashamayim vayera aron berito beheykhalo vayehi beraqim veqolot ure'amim vera'ash uvarad kaved
veot gadol nirea bashamayim isha asher-hashemesh levushah vehayarecha tachat rageleyha ve'al-roshah 'ateret sheneym 'asar kokhavim
vehi hara vatize'aq bachavaleyha uvetsirey ledata
vayera ot acher bashamayim vehine tanin gadol adom kaesh velo shive'a rashim ve'eser qeranayim ve'al-rashayv shive'a khetarim
vesachav bizenavo min-hashamayim shelishit hakokhavim vayashelikhem aretsa vayiteyatsev hatanin lifeney haisha asher hechela laledet lema'an belo'a et-benah belidetah
vateled ben zakhar asher-yire'e khal-hagoyim beshevet barezel vayilaqach benah el-haelohim veel-kiseo
vehaisha barecha hamidebara asher-sham hukhan-lah maqom meet elohim lema'an yekhalekeluha sham yamim elef umatayim veshishim
vatehi milechama bashamayim mikhael hu umaleakhayv nilechamim batanin vehatanin nilecham umaleakhayv
velo hitechazaqu vegam meqomam lo-nimetsa 'od bashamayim
vayushelakh hatanin hagadol hanachash haqademoni asher-niqera shemo maleshin vesatan hamadicha tevel kulah hu hushelakh aretsa umaleakhayv 'imo hushelakhu
vaeshema' qol gadol bashamayim vayomar 'ata vaa yeshu'at eloheynu ve'uzo umalekhuto umemeshelet meshicho ki hurad soten acheynu ha'omed lesitenam lifeney eloheynu yomam valayela
vehem nitsechuhu vedam-hase uvidevar 'edutam velo-ahavu et-nafesham 'ad lamavet
'al-ken ranu shamayim veshokheneyhem oy lakhem yoshevey erets vayam ki-yarad aleykhem hamaleshin bechema gedola mida'eto ki tiqetsar 'ito
vayehi kaasher raa hatanin ki hushelakh aretsa vayiredof et-haisha asher yaleda et-hazakhar
vayutenu laisha shetey khanefey hanesher hagadol la'uf hamidebara el-meqomah asher tekhulekal-sham mo'ed mo'adim vachetsi mipeney hanachash
vayeshalach hanachash nehar-mayim mipiv acharey haisha leshatefah banahar
vata'azor haarets et-haisha vatifetach haarets et-piha vativela' et-hanahar asher-shilach hatanin mipihu
vayiqetsof hatanin 'al-haisha vayelekh la'asot milechama 'im-yeter zare'ah hashomerim piqudey elohim vaasher 'edut yeshu'a befihem
vaehi 'omed 'al-chol hayam vaere chaya 'ola min-hayam velah 'eser qeranayim veshive'a rashim uveqareneyha 'asara khetarim uverasheyha shemot gidufim
vehachaya asher raiti mareeha kemaree hanamer verageleyha rageley dov ufiha pi areye vayiten-lah hatanin et-kocho veet-kiseo umimeshal rav
vaere vehine echad merasheyha kefatsu'a petsa' lamut umakat mavet asher-lah nirepaa vatishetomem kal-haarets acharey hachaya
vayishetachavu latanin asher-natan memeshala lachaya vayishetachavu lachaya vayomeru mi yideme lachaya umi yukhal lehilachem itah
vayinaten lah pe memalel gedolot veneatsot veshaletan nitan-lah la'asot milechama areba'im ushenayim chodashim
vatifetach et-piha lenaets et-haelohim vatenaets et-shemo veet-mishekano veet-hashokhenim bashamayim
vayinaten lah la'asot milechama 'im-haqedoshim ulenatsecham vatinaten lah memeshala 'al-kal-mishepacha va'am velashon vagoy
veyishetachavu lah kal-yoshevey haarets asher lo-nikhetevu shemotam besefer hachayim asher lase hatavucha miom hivased tevel
kal-asher ozen lo yishema'
hamolikh shevi yelekh bashevi vehahoreg bacherev harog yehareg becharev bazot savelanut veemunat haqedoshim
vaere chaya acheret 'ola min-haadama velah shetey qeranayim keqareney hase umedaberet katanin
vehi 'osa kal-piqudey hachaya harishona befaneyha umevia et-haarets veysheveyha lehishetachaot lachaya harishona asher-nirepea makat mavet asher-lah
venotenet otot gedolot vegam-esh min-hashamayim torid aretsa le'eyney beney adam
umate'a et-yshevey haarets baotot asher nitan-lah la'asot bifeney hachaya beamerah el-yshevey haarets la'asot tselem lachaya asher-huketa makat-cherev vatechi
vayinaten-lah latet rucha betselem hachaya 'ad-ki yedaber tselem hachaya vekhol asher-lo yishetachavu letselem hachaya tasegirem lamavet
vata'as et-asher kulam lemiqaton ve'ad-gadol im-eveyon veim-'ashir gam-beney hachorim gam-ha'avadim yatevu tav 'al-yad yeminam o 'al-mitsechotam
velo-yukhal ish liqenot o limekor ki im-biheyot 'alayv tav hachaya o shemah o-misepar shemah
bazot chakhema mi shebina lo yechashev misepar hachaya ki misepar adam hu umiseparo shesh meot veshishim vashesh
vaere vehineh-se 'omed 'al-har tsion ve'imo meat elef veareba'im veareba'a alafim ushemo veshem aviv katuv 'al-mitsechotam
vaeshema' qol min-hashamayim keqol mayim rabim ukheqol ra'am gadol vehaqol asher-shama'eti keqol tofesey khinor menagenim bekhinoroteyhem
vayashiru shir chadash lifeney hakise velifeney areba' hachayot velifeney hazeqenim veeyn ish yakhol lilemod et-hashir zulati meat haelef veareba'im veareba'at haalafim haniqenim min-haarets
ele hem asher lo-negoalu vanashim ki-khabetulot hema ele hem haholekhim acharey hase el-kal-asher yelekh ele niqenu mitokh beney haadam lereshit bikurim lelohim velase
vetaremit lo-nimetsea befihem ki temimim hema lifeney kise haelohim
vaere maleakh acher me'ofef bachatsi hashamayim uvefiv besorat 'olam levaser et-yshevey haarets veet-kal-goy umishepacha velashon va'am
vayiqera beqol gadol yireu et-haelohim vehavu-lo khavod ki vaa 'et mishepato vehishetachavu la'ose shamayim vaarets et-hayam uma'eyenot hamayim
umaleakh acher ba acharayv vayomar nafela nafela bavel ha'ir hagedola ki hisheqeta khal-hagoyim miyeyn chamat tazenutah
umaleakh shelishi ba achareyhem vayiqera beqol gadol kal-asher yishetachave lifeney hachaya velifeney tsalemah venasa et-tavah 'al-mitsecho o 'al-yado
gam-hu yishete miyeyn chamat elohim hanimesakh velo mahul bekhos za'emo ve'una beesh vegaferit lifeney hamaleakhim haqedoshim velifeney hase
ve'ala 'ashan 'inuyam le'olemey-'ad vehamishetachavim lachaya uletsalemah vaasher yisa et-tav shemah lo yimetseu menucha yomam valayela
bazot savelanutam shel-haqedoshim hashomerim et-mitseot haelohim veet-emunat yeshu'a
vaeshema' qol min-hashamayim medaber elay ketov asherey hametim asher-yamutu baadon me'ata amenam ken amar harucha lema'an yanuchu me'amalam ki ma'aseyhem holekhim achareyhem
vaere vehine 'anan bahir ve'al-he'anan yoshev kidemut ben-adam va'ateret zahav 'al-rosho uveyado magal melutash
umaleakh acher yatsa min-haheykhal vayize'aq beqol gadol el-hayshev 'al-he'anan lemor shelach magalekha uqetsor ki vaa ha'et liqetsor ki yavesh qetsir haarets
vayishelach hayshev be'anan et-magalo baarets vehaarets niqetsara
umaleakh acher yatsa min-haheykhal asher bashamayim vegam-lo magal melutash beyado

vayetse maleakh acher min-hamizebecha velo memeshelet haesh vayiqera qol gadol el-asher beyado hamagal hamelutash lemor shelach magalekha hamelutash uvetsor et-ashekelot gefen haarets ki-vashelu 'ineveyhem
vayanef hamaleakh et-magalo 'al-haarets vayivetsor et-ashekelot gefen haarets vayashelikhem begat-chamat elohim hagedola
vatidarekh hagat michuts la'ir vayetse-dam min-hagat vaya'al 'ad riseney hasusim derekhe-elef veshesh meot ris
vaere ot acher bashamayim gadol venifela shive'a maleakhim noseim et-sheva' hamakot haacharonot ki vahen kala za'am elohim
vaere keyam zekhokhit balul baesh veet-hamitegaberim 'al-hachaya ve'al-tsalemah ve'al-tavah ve'al-misepar shemah 'omedim 'al-yam hazekhokhit vekhinorot elohim bideyhem
vayashiru et-shirat mshe 'eved elohim veshirat hase lemor gedolim ma'aseykha venifelaim yeho elohim tsevaot tsedeq veemet derakheykha melekh hagoyim
mi lo yiraakha yeho velo yiten kavod leshimekha ki-qadosh ata levadekha ki khal-hagoyim yavou veyishetachavu lefaneykha ki-nigelu mishepetey tsideqekha
veacharey khen raiti vehine nifetach heykhal mishekan ha'edut bashamayim
vayetseu min-haheykhal shive'a hamaleakhim hanoseim et-sheva' hamakot vehem melubashim bad tahor vetsach vachagurim ezorey zahav 'al-chazoteyhem
veachat meareba' hachayot natena leshive'at hamaleakhim sheva' qa'arot zahav meleot chamat haelohim hachay le'olemey 'olamim
vayimale haheykhal 'ashan mikevod elohim ve'uzo velo-yakhol ish lavo el-haheykhal 'ad asher kalu sheva' hamakot asher bidey shive'a hamaleakhim
vaeshema' qol gadol min-haheykhal omer el-shive'at hamaleakhim lekhu hariqu et-sheva' qa'arot chamat haelohim aretsa
vayelekh harishon vayareq et-qa'arato 'al-haarets vayehi shechin ra' umakheiv baanashim asher-'aleyhem tav hachaya uvamishetachavim letsalemah
vayareq hasheni et-qa'arato 'al-hayam vayehi ledam kedam chalal vatamat kal-nefesh chaya asher bayam
vayareq hashelishi et-qa'arato baneharot uvema'eyenot hamayim vayiheyu ledam
vaeshema' et-maleakh hamayim omer tsadiq ata haho vehaya vehaqadosh ki-khen shafateta
ki dam qedoshim uneviim shafakhu vedam hisheqitam ki-gemul yadam hu
vaeshema' et-hamizebecha omer amenam ken yeho elohim tsevaot emet vatsedeq mishepateykha
vayareq hamaleakh harevi'i et-qa'arato 'al-hashamesh vayinaten lo lelahet et-beney haadam baesh
vayelohatu veney-adam bechom gadol vayegadefu et-shem elohim asher-lo memeshelet hamakot haele velo shavu latet-lo hakavod
vayareq hachamishi et-qa'arato 'al-kise hachaya vatecheshakh malekhutah vayenashekhu et-leshonam mikeev lev
vayegadefu et-elohey hashamayim mimakheovam ushechinam velo shavu mima'aseyhem
vayareq hashishi et-qa'arato 'al-hanahar hagadol nehar-perat vayecherevu meymayv leyasher mesila lamelakhim habaim mimizerach-shamesh
vaere vehine mipi hatanin umipi hachaya umipi nevi hasheqer yotseot shalosh ruchot temeot domot litsefarede'im
ki ruchot hashedim hena vehen 'osot otot veyotseot el-malekhey erets vetevel kulah leasefam lemilechemet hayom hahu hagadol yom elohey hatsevaot
hineni va keganav asherey hashoqed veshomer et-begadayv pen-yelekh 'arom verau et-'erevato
vayeesof otam el-hamaqom haniqera ve'iverit har megidon
vayareq hamaleakh hashevi'i et-qa'arato baavir vayetse qol gadol meheykhal hashamayim min-hakise vayomer hayo niheyata
vayiheyu qolot ure'amim uveraqim vayehi ra'ash gadol asher lo-haya khamohu lemin-heyot adam 'al-haarets ki gadol hara'ash 'ad-meod
veha'ir hagedola necheleqa lishelosha chalaqim vatipolena 'arey hagoyim vatizakher bavel hagedola lifeney elohim latet-lah kos yeyn chamat apo
vayanas kal-i veheharim lo nimetsau
veaveney varad kakikar misheqalam yaredu min hashamayim 'al-beney haadam vayegadefu veney-haadam et-haelohim 'al-odot makat habarad ki-khaveda makato meod
vayavo echad min-shive'a hamaleakhim hanoseim sheva' haqe'arot vayedaber elay lemor bo veareakha et-mishepat hazona hagedola hayoshevet 'al-mayim rabim
asher zanu achareyha malekhey haadama vayishekeru shokheney tevel miyeyn tazenutah
vayevieni varucha hamidebara vaere vehine isha yoshevet 'al-chaya aduma khatola' meleat shemot gidufim velah shive'a rashim ve'eser qeranayim
vehaisha levushah aregaman veshani vehi mukhelala bazahav veeven-yeqara ufeninim uveyadah kos zahav melea to'evot vetumeat tazenutah
ve'al-mitsechah katuv shem bederekh sod bavel hagedola em hazonot veto'avot haadama
vaere et-haisha shekhura midam haqedoshim umidam 'edey yeshu'a vaeshetomem 'al-hamaree shama gedola
vayomer elay hamaleakh lama ze hishetomameta ani agid lekha et-sod haisha vehachaya hanoset otah ba'alat shive'at harashim va'aseret haqeranayim

hachaya asher raita hi hayeta veeynena vehi ta'ale mitehom vetered laavadon veyoshevey haarets asher shemam eynenu nikhetav besefer hachayim miom hivased tevel yishetomamu bireotam et-hachaya asher hayeta veeynena vetavo
ze hamuvan uvo chakhema shive'at harashim shive'at harim hema asher haisha yoshevet 'aleyhem
veshive'a melakhim hema chamisha mehem nafelu vehaechad yesheno vehaacher 'od lo-va vehaya ki yavo 'amod ya'amod lizeman me'at
vehachaya asher hayeta veeynena vehu shemini vehu min-hashive'a veyered laavadon
ve'eser haqeranayim asher raita 'asara melakhim hem asher lo-qibelu malekhut 'ad-hena raq lesha'a achat memeshala khamelakhim yeqabelu 'im-hachaya
velahem 'etsa echat veet-kocham veet-memeshaletam yitenu lachaya
hema yilachamu vase vehase yukhal lahem ki hu adoney haadonim umelekh hamelakhim vaasher 'imo qeruim uvechirim veneemanim hema
vayomer elay hamayim hahem asher raita asher hazona yoshevet 'aleyhem 'amim vahamonim hema vegoyim uleshonot
ve'eser haqeranayim asher raita vehachaya hema yiseneu et-hazona ve'asuha galemuda va'aruma veakhelu et-besarah veotah yiserefu vaesh
ki haelohim natan belibam la'asot et-'atsato vela'asot 'etsa achat velatet et-memeshaletam lachaya 'ad ki-yishelemu diverey haelohim
vehaisha asher raita hi ha'ir hagedola asher-hi geveret mamelekhot haarets
acharey-khen raiti maleakh acher yored min-hashamayim vehu khabir-kocha vehaarets heira mikevodo
vayiqera beqol 'oz lemor nafela nafela bavel hagedola vatehi neve se'irim umishemar lekhal-rucha tame umishemar lekhal-'of tame venimeas
ki miyeyn chamat zenutah shatu kal-hagoyim umalekhey erets zanu achareyha vesocharey erets mishife'at ta'anugeyha he'eshiru
vaeshema' qol acher min-hashamayim omer tseu mimena 'ami pen-titechaberu el-chatoteyha ufen-tuku mimakoteyha
ki-chatoteyha higi'u 'ad-lashamayim vayizekor elohim et-'aonoteyha
shalemu-lah gemulah shegamela lakhem va'asu-lah kifelayim kefa'olah bakos asher masekha misekhu-lah kifelayim
kaasher hiteromama vehite'anega ken tenu-lah chevel vaevel ki amera vilevavah ani yashaveti maleka velo eheye alemana veevel lo eree
'al-ken beyom echad tavona makoteyha mavet veevel vera'av veniserefa bemo-esh ki chazaq yeho elohim hashofet otah
uvakhu vesafedu 'aleyha malekhey-erets asher zanu vehite'anegu 'imah ki yireu et-'ashan serefatah
umerachoq ya'amedu mipeney eymat 'inuyah veameru oy oy lakh bavel ha'ir hagedola ha'ir hachazaqa ki-vesha'a achat ba mishepatekh
vesocharey haarets bokhim umiteabelim 'aleyha ki 'ata lo-yiqene 'od ish et-masa oniotam
et-masa zahav vakhesef veeven yeqara ufeninim uvuts vearegaman umeshi veshani vekhal-'atsey vosem vekhal-keley shenehabim vekhal-keley 'ets yaqar ukheley nechshet uvarezel vashayish
veqinamon vaamomon uqetoret samim umor ulevona veyayin vashemen vesolet vechitim umiqene vatson vesusim umarekavot va'avadim venefesh adam
vehamegadim machemad nafeshekh azelu mimekh vekhal-shamen umaitsehir avad mimekh velo timetsa 'od
verokheleyhem asher he'eshiru mimena ya'amedu merachoq mipeney eymat 'inuyah uvakhu vehiteabalu
veameru oy oy ha'ir hagedola hamekhusa shesh vearegaman veshani umukhelala zahav veeven yeqara ufeninim ki-vesha'a achat hachorav ha'osher hagadol haze
vekhal-chovel vekhal-ba'al-ma'avoret vehamalachim vekhal-'osey melakha bayam 'amedu merachoq
vayitse'aqu bireotam 'ashan serefatah vayomeru mi ve'arim ka'ir hagedola
vayizerequ 'afar 'al-rasheyhem vayitse'aqu bakho vesafod lemor oy oy ha'ir hagedola asher-bah he'eshiru mehonah kol asher-lahem oniot bayam ki-vesha'a achat hachorava
ranu 'aleyha hashamayim vehashelichim haqedoshim vehaneviim ki-shafat elohim et-mishepatekhem mimena
vayisa maleakh nora even gedola kefelach rekhev vayashelikheha el-tokh hayam vayomar kakha tushelakh bema'aratsa bavel ha'ir hagedola velo timatse 'od

veqol hamenagenim bekhinor vehamezamerim umechalelim bachalilim umachetserim bachatsotserot bal-yishama' 'od betokhekh vekhal-charash vechoshev bal-yimatse vakh 'od veqol rechayim bal-yishama' 'od beqirebekh
veor ner lo-yair lakh 'od veqol chatan veqol kala lo-yishama' bakh 'od ki khine'anayikh hayu nikhebadey erets uvikheshafayikh nidechu khal-hagoyim
uvah nimetsa dam haneviim vehaqedoshim vekhal-harugey arets
acharey-khen shama'eti qol gadol keqol hamon rav bashamayim haomerim halaluyah hayeshu'a vehakavod veha'oz leloheynu
ki-emet veyashar mishepatayv ki-heshiv gemul 'al-hazona hagedola asher-hishechita et-haarets betazenutah liderosh miyadah et-dam-'avadayv
vayomeru shenit halaluyah va'ashanah ya'ale le'olemey 'olamim
ve'eserim veareba'a hazeqenim veareba' hachayot nafelu 'al-peneyhem vayishetachavu lelohim hayoshev 'al-hakise vayomeru amen halaluyah
veqol yotse min-hakise vayomar halalu et-eloheynu kal-'avadayv vireayv haqetanim 'im-hagedolim
vaeshema' qol keqol hamon rav ukheqol mayim rabim ukheqol re'amim chazaqim vayomeru halaluyah ki-malakh eloheynu yeho tsevaot
nisemecha venagila venitena lo hakavod ki vaa chatunat hase veisheto hiteqadasha
vayinaten lah lilebosh buts tahor vatsach ki habuts hu tsideqot haqedoshim
vayomer elay ketov asherey haqeruim el-mishete chatunat hase vayomer elay ele hadevarim emet hem diverey elohim
vaepol leragelayv lehishetachaot lo vayomer elay ree al-ta'aseh-zot 'eved ani kamokha vechaver lekha uleacheykha asher 'edut yeshu'a befihem hishetachave lelohim ki 'edut yeshu'a hi rucha hanevua
vaere et-hashamayim nifetachim vehineh-sus lavan veharokhev 'alayv yiqare lo neeman vaamiti uvetsedeq hu shofet velochem
ve'eynayv kelabat-esh va'atarot harebe berosho velo shem katuv asher lo-yada' ish ki im-hu levado
vehu lavush levush meadam badam ushemo niqera devar haelohim
vetsiveot hashamayim yotseim acharayv 'al-susim levanim vehem melubashim bigedey-vuts lavan vetahor
umipiv yotset cherev chada lehakot et-hagoyim vehu yire'em beshevet barezel vehu dorekh purat yeyn chamat-af elohey hatsevaot
ve'al-bigedo ve'al-yerekho katuv shem melekh hamelakhim vaadoney haadonim
vaere maleakh echad 'omed bashamesh vayize'aq qol gadol vayomer el-tsipor kal-kanaf asher-ta'uf bachatsi hashamayim bou veheasefu 'al-zevach hagadol asher lelohim
vaakhaletem besar melakhim uvesar sarey alafim uvesar giborim uvesar susim verokheveyhem uvesar kal-beney chorim va'avadim haqetanim 'im-hagedolim
vaere et-hachaya umalekhey haarets vaagapeyhem niqehalim la'asot milechama 'im-harokhev 'al-hasus ve'im-tsevao
vatitafes hachaya unevi hasheqer itah asher-'asa haotot lefaneyha vehidicha bahen et-noseey tav-hachaya vehamishetachavim letsalemah usheneyhem hushelekhu chayim baagam-haesh habo'er begaferit
vehanishearim neheregu vacherev hayotset mipi-harokhev 'al-hasus vekhal-ha'of save'u mibesaram
vaere maleakh yored min-hashamayim uveyado mafetecha hatehom vekhevel gadol
vayitepos et-hatanin et-hanachash haqademoni hu hamaleshin vehu hasatan vayaaserehu elef shanim
vayashelikhehu el-tehom vayisegor 'alayv vayachetom 'alayv lema'an asher lo-yadicha 'od et-hagoyim 'ad-melot elef hashanim veacharey-khen yutar lizeman mitse'ar

vaere khiseot vayeshevu 'aleyhem vehamishepat nitan beyadam venafeshot haharugim 'al-'edut yeshu'a ve'al-devar haelohim vaasher lo hishetachavu lachaya uletsalemah velo qibelu et-tavah 'al-mitsechotam ve'al-yadam vayicheyu vayimelekhu 'im-hamashicha elef shanim
veyeter hametim lo-chayu 'ad-melot elef hashanim zot hatechiya harishona
umi sheyesh-lo cheleq batechiya harishona asherayv veqadosh hu bahem lo-yishelot hamavet hasheni ki yiheyu kohanim lelohim velimeshicho umalekhu ito elef shanim
veacharey khelot elef hashanim yutar hasatan mibeyt mishemaro
veyatsa lehadicha et-hagoyim beareba' kanefot haarets et-gog umagog uleqabetsam lamilechama asher miseparam kechol hayam
vaya'alu 'al-merechavey erets vayasobu et-machane haqedoshim veet-ha'ir hachaviva vatered esh meet haelohim min-hashamayim vatokhal otam
vehasatan asher hidicham hushelakh baagam-esh vegaferit asher-sham gam-hachaya unevi hashaqer veyuseru yomam valayela le'olemey 'olamim
vaere kise lavan vegadol vehayoshev 'alayv mipanayv nasu erets veshamayim velo-nimetsa lahem maqom
vaere et-hametim haqetanim 'im-hagedolim 'omedim lifeney hakise usefarim nifetachim vayipatach sefer acher vehu sefer hachayim vayishafetu hametim min-hakatuv basefarim kema'aseyhem
vayashev hayam et-metayv vehamavet vehasheol heshivu et-meteyhem vayishafetu ish ish kema'aseyhem
vehamavet vehasheol hushelekhu vaagam-haesh vehu hamavet hasheni
vekhal-ish asher lo-nimetsa khatuv besefer hachayim hushelakh baagam haesh
vaere shamayim chadashim veerets chadasha ki hashamayim harishonim vehaarets harishona 'averu vehayam eynenu 'od
vaere vehine ha'ir haqedosha yerushalayim hachadasha yoredet meet haelohim min-hashamayim vehi metuqenet kakala hamequshetet leva'elah
vaeshema' qol gadol min-hakise lemor hine mishekan elohim 'im-beney haadam veshakhan betokham vehema yiheyu-lo le'am vehu haelohim yiheye itam eloheyhem
umacha elohim kal-dime'a me'eyneyhem vehamavet lo yiheyeh-'od vegam-evel uze'aqa ukheev lo yiheyeh-'od ki harishonot 'avaru
vayomer hayoshev 'al-hakise hineni 'ose hakol chadash vayomer elay ketov asher hadevarim haele amitim veneemanim hem
vayomer elay hayo niheyata ani haalef vehatav harosh vehasof ani eten latsame mima'eyan mayim chayim chinam
hamenatsecha yirash hakol vaani eheyeh-lo lelohim vehu yiheyeh-li leven
aval rakey halev vaasher eynam maaminim vehamegoalim vehameratsechim vehazonim vehamekhashefim ve'ovedey haelilim vekhal-hameshaqerim cheleqam haagam habo'er beesh vegaferit asher-hu hamavet hasheni
vayavo elay echad mishive'at hamaleakhim hanoseim sheva' haqe'arot hameleot sheva' hamakot haacharonot vayedaber elay lemor bo veareakha et-hakala eshet hase
vayiqacheni varucha 'al-har gadol vegavoha vayareeni ha'ir haqedosha yerushalayim hagedola yoredet min-hashamayim meet haelohim
ve'aleyha kevod elohim veor nagehah keeven yeqara meod keeven yashefe hamaveheqet ke'eyn haqarach
velah choma gedola ugevoha usheneym 'asar she'arim lah ve'al-hashe'arim sheneym 'asar maleakhim veshemot ketuvim 'aleyhem vehem shemot sheneym-'asar shivetey beney yiserael
she'arim shelosha mimizerach she'arim shelosha mitsafon she'arim shelosha minegev ushe'arim shelosha mima'arav
ulechomat ha'ir sheneym 'asar mosadot va'aleyhem sheneym 'asar shemot lisheneym 'asar shelichey hase
uveyad hamedaber elay qene zahav lamod et-ha'ir veet-she'areyha veet chomatah
umoshav ha'ir meruba' vearekah kerachebah vayamad et-ha'ir biqene hamida sheneym 'asar elef ris arekah verachebah veqomatah mida achat lahem
vayamad et-chomatah mea veareba'im veareba' amot bemidat ish asher-hi midat hamaleakh
uvineyan chomat ha'ir even yashefe veha'ir zahav mufaz dome lizekhokhit zaka
umosedot chomat ha'ir murebatsot bekhal-aveney chefets hamosad harishon yashefe hasheni sapir hashelishi shevo harevi'i baraqet
hachamishi yahalom hashishi odem hashevi'i tareshish hashemini shoham hateshi'i fiteda ha'asiri nofekh achad he'asar leshem sheneym he'asar achelama
usheneym 'asar hashe'arim sheteym 'esere maregaliot kal-sha'ar vasha'ar maregalit echat urechov ha'ir zahav mufaz kizekhokhit behira
veheykhal lo-raiti vah ki yeho elohim tsevaot hu vehase heykhalah
veha'ir eynena tserikha leor hashemesh ulenogah hayarecha ki-khevod elohim heir lah venerah hu hase
vehagoyim yelekhu leorah umalekhey-erets meviim kevodam vetifearetam eleyha
ushe'areyha yomam lo-yisageru ki layela lo-yiheye sham
veheviu vah kevod hagoyim vetifearetam
velo-yavo vah kal-tame ve'ose to'eva vashaqer ki im-haketuvim besefer hachayim shel-hase
vayareeni nachal shel-mayim chayim zakh mavehiq ke'eyn haqarach yotse mikise haelohim vehase
uvetokh rechov ha'ir veel-sefat hanachal mize umize 'ets chayim 'ose peri sheteym 'esere ki midey chodesh bechadesho yiten et-pireyo va'ale ha'ets literufat hagoyim
vekhal-cherem lo yiheyeh-'od vekhise haelohim vehase yiheyeh-bah va'avadayv yesharatuhu
vehema yireu et-panayv ushemo 'al-mitsechotam
velayela lo yiheyeh-'od velo yitsetarekhu 'od leor ner uleor shamesh ki-yeho elohim hu yair lahem umalekhu 'ad-'olemey 'olamim
vayomer elay hadevarim haele amitim veneemanim vayeho elohey ruchot haneviim shalach et-maleakho lehareot et-'avadayv et asher-hayo yiheye bimehera
hineni va maher asherey hashomer et-diverey nevuat hasefer haze
vaani yochanan hu haroe ele veshome'am vayehi keshame'i vekhireoti vaepol lerageley hamaleakh asher-hereani et-ele lehishetachaot lo
vayomer elay ree al-ta'aseh-zot ki-anokhi 'eved kamokha vechaver lekha uleacheykha haneviim velashomerim et-diverey hasefer haze lelohim hishetachave
vayomer elay al-tachetom et-diverey nevuat hasefer haze ki qarov hamo'ed
hachomes yosif lachemos vehatame yosif lehitame vehatsadiq yosif lehitsadeq vehaqadosh yosif lehiteqadesh
vehineni va maher usekhari iti leshalem leish kema'asehu
ani haalef vehatav harosh vehasof harishon vehaacharon
asherey hamekhabesim et-salemoteyhem lema'an yiheye lahem risheyon be'ets hachayim uvau ha'ira derekh hashe'arim
umichuts la'ir hakelavim vehamekhashefim vehazonim vehameratsechim ve'ovedey haelilim vekhal-ohev sheqer ve'osehu
ani yeshu'a shalacheti et-maleakhi leha'id lakhem et-ele bifeney haqehilot anokhi shoresh david vetoladeto kokhav nogah hashachar
veharucha vehakala omerim bo vehashome'a yomar bo vehatsame yavo vehechafets yiqach mayim chayim chinam
me'id ani bekhal-hashome'a diverey nevuat hasefer haze asher im-yosif ish 'aleyhem yosif 'alayv haelohim et-hamakot haketuvot basefer haze
vaasher yigera' midiverey sefer hanevua hazot yigera' haelohim et-cheleqo me'ets hachayim ume'ir haqodesh haketuvim basefer haze
hame'id ha'edut hazot omer amenam ken ani va maher amen boah-na haadon yeshu'a
chesed adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha 'im kal-haqedoshim amen
